bank.retain_mission: Extract SEO strategies, search performance data, ranking changes, technical audit findings, content optimization results, and link building outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target queries, the technical SEO baseline, content patterns that rank, link sources that hold, and the user's evidence standards. Ignore one-off ranking fluctuations and ephemeral SERP noise.

mental_models.name: SEO Best Practices
mental_models.source_query: What are the SEO best practices combining industry standards with what has actually worked? Include on-page SEO, technical SEO, schema markup, internal linking, and content structure. Prefer observed data over generic advice.

mental_models.name: Search Performance
mental_models.source_query: What search optimization strategies have performed well or poorly? Include specific numbers when available (rankings, CTR, traffic, conversions). What patterns emerge about what works?

directives.name: Data over dogma
directives.content: When making SEO decisions, prefer observed performance data over industry best practices. Always check the Search Performance page before recommending an approach.
